description: Enable infrastructure vendors, MSPs, and platform teams to deliver managed database services that compete with hyperscalers.

use_cases.title: Platform Teams
use_cases.desc: Provide self-service database provisioning for development teams with governance controls.

use_cases.title: MSPs & CSPs
use_cases.desc: Offer managed database services to customers with multi-tenant isolation and billing integration.

use_cases.title: Infrastructure Vendors
use_cases.desc: Bundle KubeDB with your hardware/software stack to compete with Cloud DBaaS.

use_cases.title: System Integrators
use_cases.desc: Deploy standardized database infrastructure across multiple customer environments.
